## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** SearchPage.jsx with CSS styling
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Screen Reader Semantic (HIGH), Cognitive Neurodivergent (MEDIUM)
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Auditory, Keyboard, Vestibular

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 1 |
| MAJOR | 2 |
| MINOR | 1 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed
None - both escalated perspectives have findings

### Perspectives With Findings - Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- Missing aria-live for dynamic results updates - Screen Reader Semantic - MAJOR - 4.1.3
- Missing accessible name for spinner - Screen Reader Semantic - MAJOR - 1.1.1
- Missing aria-live for no-results message - Cognitive Neurodivergent - MAJOR - 3.3.3

**UX Design**
- No feedback for loading state beyond visual spinner - Cognitive Neurodivergent - MINOR - 3.2.3

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification
None

### Recommended Next Step
REVISE (MAJOR findings present)

---

## Detailed Findings

### 1. Missing aria-live for dynamic results updates
**Finding:** Results section updates dynamically but has no aria-live attribute to announce changes to screen readers
**WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** `<section aria-label="Search results">` updates content without live region
**Fix:** Add `role="region"` and `aria-live="polite"` to results section

### 2. Missing accessible name for spinner
**Finding:** Loading spinner has no accessible name or role for screen readers
**WCAG:** 1.1.1 Non-text Content
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** `.spinner` div has no ARIA attributes
**Fix:** Add `role="status"` and `aria-label="Loading search results..."`

### 3. Missing aria-live for no-results message
**Finding:** No-results message appears visually but isn't announced to screen readers
**WCAG:** 3.3.3 Error Suggestion
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)
**Evidence:** `.no-results` paragraph has no live region
**Fix:** Add `role="alert"` to no-results message

### 4. No feedback for loading state beyond visual spinner
**Finding:** Loading state only shows visual spinner with no text description
**WCAG:** 3.2.3 Consistent Navigation
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Visual Design)
**Evidence:** `.spinner` has no text description
**Fix:** Add "Loading..." text adjacent to spinner with `aria-live`
